hero.badge: Live queue tracking for food stalls
hero.title: Turn your line into a <highlight>live queue</highlight>.
hero.subtitle: Take orders, hand out a number, and let guests watch their spot move in real time — no app, no account, no crowd at the counter. You stay in flow; they stay informed.

how.title: From order to pickup, without the shouting
how.subtitle: Quelly walks every order through a simple flow your guests can follow on their own phone.
how.step1Body: Open your stall for service in one tap. Order numbers reset cleanly and count up from there.
how.step2Body: Add items, and the guest gets a number. Share your shop link or QR — no app, no sign-up for them.
how.step3Body: Tap to mark Ready, then Collected. Every guest's screen updates instantly over a live connection.

features.title: Everything a stall needs, nothing it doesn't
features.subtitle: Purpose-built for fast counters and hungry crowds — no bloated POS, no clutter.
features.f1Body: Status changes broadcast to every guest watching the same shop the moment you tap. No reloads, no polling.
features.f2Body: Guests just type their number on your public page. No download, no account, no email — they watch and walk up.
features.f3Body: Every stall gets its own shareable public link. Print it, QR it, post it — it always points to your live queue.
features.f4Body: Numbers are scoped to each service session, so they reset every shift and stay easy to call out.
features.f5Body: Owner tools are locked behind secure login; guests only ever see what they need — their order and its place in line.
features.f6Body: Add items fast, advance the queue with a tap, and end a shift to clear out anything still open in one move.

showcase.title: Two screens, perfectly in sync
showcase.subtitle: You run the counter; they watch from anywhere in line. The instant you advance an order, their screen catches up.
showcase.point1: Guests see their number, their status, and how many orders are ahead.
showcase.point2: You see the whole queue and move orders forward with a single tap.
showcase.point3: Ending a shift clears every open order at once — start fresh next time.

cta.title: Ready to clear the counter?
cta.body: Set up your stall, start a shift, and hand out your first number in minutes. Free to get started.
